hook: Resale landed is moving — but sellers are blinking first 📉

slides.title: Landed: New vs Resale
slides.subtitle: Who is selling, where, and how much are they giving away to close the deal?

slides.headline: All recent landed deals are resale — zero new launches
slides.footnote: URA caveats (typeOfSale=3 = resale sub-sales). No typeOfSale=1 new-sale transactions recorded in this week's data set.

slides.title: 3 things driving landed resale now
items: Faber Hills (D05, OCR freehold) is the most active cluster — semis trading $6.45M–$7.8M, terraces $4.0M–$4.1M across the past 12 months.
Sentosa Cove (D04, 99-yr) peaked at $22.8M in Sep 2022; by Feb 2025 a comparable plot on Coral Island sold for $14.8M — a 35% haircut off peak.
Springwood terraces (Jalan Mat Jambol, D05 freehold RCR) hit $6.34M in Sep 2023 but the most recent deal in Mar 2026 was $5.58M — sellers gave back ~12%.

slides.title: 4 landed clusters — price trajectory

items.label: Faber Hills Semis
items.sub: D05 OCR freehold. Stable range; no meaningful new-high since Apr 2024's $7.6M.

items.label: Springwood Terrace
items.sub: D05 RCR freehold. Mar 2026 deal 12% below Sep 2023 peak of $6.34M.

items.label: Sentosa Cove Det.
items.sub: D04 CCR 99-yr. Feb 2025 deal 35% below Sep 2022 peak of $22.8M.

items.label: Zehnder Rd Semi
items.sub: D05 RCR freehold. Sep 2021 deal; comparable area unit at $5.19M in Jul 2024 — flat for 3 yrs.

slides.footnote: URA caveats, resale transactions 2021–2026. Land area basis. Source: URA REALIS.

slides.headline: Sentosa Cove detached: 35% off the 2022 peak price
slides.footnote: Peak: $22.8M (Sep 2022, 1,048 sqm, Coral Island). Latest: $14.8M (Feb 2025, 737 sqm, Coral Island). URA REALIS.

slides.title: Where sellers are giving ground
items: Sentosa Cove: Multiple transactions in 2023–2025 consistently below 2022 highs — a structural repricing, not a one-off. Leasehold drag is real.
Springwood (D05 RCR): The $6.34M Sep 2023 high has not been repeated. Mar 2026 cleared at $5.58M — buyers are extracting ~$700K off the ask.
Faber Hills semis: Price range has compressed. The $8.8M outlier (Jul 2022) hasn't returned; market has settled into a tighter $6.45M–$7.8M band.
Freehold OCR terraces (D05): Holding value better than CCR 99-yr — Faber terrace at $4.0–4.1M in mid-2024 vs $3.48–3.8M in 2022, a quiet +10% gain.

slides.title: New launch landed? Buy resale instead.
slides.body: There are zero new landed launches in the current data. Every deal is resale — and motivated sellers in Sentosa Cove and D05 RCR are negotiating. Freehold OCR terraces in Faber Hills are the quiet hold: no big upside but no leasehold decay either. If you must have landed CCR, Sentosa pricing at $14.8M on a 737 sqm plot now looks like a 2021 entry point — but the 99-yr clock is ticking.
slides.quote: The discount is already on the table. The question is whether you're at the table.

caption:
Resale landed is moving — but sellers are giving ground to close. 📉

• Sentosa Cove detached: -35% off Sep 2022 peak, now clearing at $14.8M
• Springwood D05 terraces: buyers extracting ~$700K below 2023 highs
• Freehold OCR terraces (Faber Hills) quietly +10% since 2022 — the quiet hold

Zero new landed launches in current data. Every deal is resale — and the motivated sellers are already negotiating. Know where the discount is.
